description_long: This is a mid-century modern style chair featuring a curved, dark wood veneer seat and backrest, both with a smooth, slightly contoured surface for ergonomic comfort. The backrest is attached to the seat with two visible metal fasteners, giving it a distinctive, minimalist look. The chair is supported by four slender, black metal legs that are slightly splayed for stability, with the rear legs curving to support the backrest. The seat and backrest have a rich, walnut wood grain pattern, adding warmth and sophistication to the design. There are no armrests, making the chair compact and versatile for various settings. The overall construction suggests durability and a blend of classic and contemporary aesthetics, suitable for urban environments such as cafes, offices, or waiting areas.
description: A mid-century modern chair with a curved walnut wood seat and backrest, supported by four black metal legs. The design is minimalist, ergonomic, and lacks armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved wood seat and backrest, with two visible fasteners on the backrest and all four black metal legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the ergonomic curve of the seat and backrest, and the splayed metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wood backrest with two fasteners and the rear metal legs curving upward.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the seat and backrest curvature and the supporting legs.
